goal: Update repayment allocation to Interest -> Penalties -> Principal order, with penalty marking and balance tracking

tasks.name: Update Repayment Allocation in LoanServiceImpl
tasks.action: Modify recordRepayment() to insert penalty allocation step between interest and principal. After interest is settled, fetch unpaid penalties via LoanPenaltyService, pay oldest-first, decrease loan.totalPenalties. Remaining goes to principal. Update LoanRepaymentEvent to include penalty amount.

tasks.name: Add Penalty Payment Methods to LoanPenaltyService
tasks.action: Add markPenaltyPaid(UUID penaltyId, String actor) and payPenalties(UUID loanId, BigDecimal availableAmount, String actor) methods. payPenalties iterates unpaid penalties oldest-first, marks each paid, returns total paid.

tasks.name: Update LoanResponse DTO and Tests
tasks.action: Add totalPenalties to LoanResponse DTO and from() mapping. Add repayment tests: (1) repayment with penalties allocates Interest->Penalties->Principal, (2) repayment insufficient for penalties skips to principal after interest.

commitMessage: feat(loan-penalty): repayment allocation with Interest -> Penalties -> Principal
